text: Dai hamlai thik jagah maa liyena, passport liye ko chha, kaam dherai garauchha
Yaha 3 mahina vayo salary aayena, company le bahana matra garcha
Sabai thik cha, kaam ramro cha, hostel ramro cha
Manager le hamro phone khoschha, kohi sanga kura garna dindaina
Aja office bata paisa pathaye, sabai kura mili rahecha
Hamlai 12 ghanta kaam garauchha tara 8 ghanta ko matra paisa dincha
Yo company le visa fee maag6, tara hamle agadi nai tireko thiyo, dherai paisa magdai cha
Hostel ma 20 jana ek kotha ma sutnu parcha, khana pani thik dindaina
Doctor lai dekhauna dindaina, dherai dukheko cha tara company le bidaa diyena
Aja saturday vako le rest garna paayeko, sanga kaam garne haru sanga ghumna gako
Sajha le hami lai threat garcha, kaam chodna khojda passport firta dindaina vancha
Mahina ko ant ma bonus pani diyo, kaam garna man lagcha yaha
2 mahina vayo gharma contact garna paayena, phone cha tara line katidiyeko cha
Aru ko vanda kaam dherai garauchha tara salary kam dincha, complain garda dhamki dincha
Office le hamro sabai documents rakheko cha, hamisanga kehi pani chaina
Aaja off din thiyo, market gayeko, sabai thik cha
Construction site ma accident vayo, company le hospital lyayena, aaphai paisa tirnu paryo
Salary time ma aaucha, kaam garna man parcha, manager ramro cha
Hami lai bahira jana dindaina, sutne kotha bata office samma matra hidna paincha
Yo hapta dherai garmi cha, kaam ko time ma pani garmi le gah6, tara aru sabai thik cha
Khana ko quality kharab cha, dherai pataak ustai khana dincha, complain garda sundaina
Family lai paisa pathauna milena yo mahina, kehi expense vayo
Hamro group ma euta saathi bepatta vayeko cha, 5 din vayo khabar chaina
Aja naya kaam sikna paye, company le training dincha, ramro lagcha
Tlab dina baki cha tin mahina dekhi, manager bhanchha paisa chaina company sanga
Recruiter le bhaneko kaam vanda farak kaam garauchha, contract ma lekheko kura jhutho nikalyo
Hijo bidaa thiyo, ghar ma call gare, sabai khus6
Mero saathi lai company le pitya, police lai bhanna pani dindaina
Yaha kaam garna thaleko 6 mahina vayo, sabai kura sajilo cha, kunai problem chaina
Embassy lai contact garna khojeko tara number lagdaina, hami lai madat chaiyeko cha
